title: GlacierWoolOverlay
description: Glacier Wool Overlay is a 32x Bedwars wool overlay designed for players who enjoy custom wool textures while practicing bridging and playing Bedwars. It provides a clean, smooth look, making block placement feel satisfying and distraction-free
body:
# Glacier Wool Overlay

****Glacier Wool Overlay is a 1.8.9, 32x Bedwars wool overlay designed for bridging practice and PvP. It features a clean, smooth wool texture that enhances visibility without distractions. Optimized for custom wool lovers, this pack ensures a satisfying block placement experience. Future versions coming soon for newer Minecraft versions.****
![Wools overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afc53a437c6964475e4c67078b7dcad31236e843.jpeg)
